title: COCODOR Reed Diffuser Oil Refill/White Jasmine /200ml / 1 Pack/Aromatherapy, Home Fragrance, Scented Oils, Oils for Reed Diffuser, Bathroom Home Décor
features: White Jasmine - A harmonious mixture of a strong floral scent, sweet berries, and a cozy and powdery note for a fragrance that delivers the sensation of a softener.
Compatible with other Cocod'or Reed Diffusers. When the oil in the diffuser bottle runs out, put this REFILL into an empty diffuser bottle.

description: Product Description Signature Reed Diffuser/200ml Cocodor's signature product, simple design Real Flower Diffuser/200ml A flower diffuser that retains the freshness and beauty of fresh flowers from Cocodor's Mist Flower Farm. Basic Reed Diffuser/10ml Basic diffusers are available at low cost for its freshness and sweetness qualities. White Edition Diffuser/200ml Trendy and clean design suitable for emotional interior Black Edition Diffuser/500ml Stylish large-capacity diffuser with black modernity and urban chic Diffuser Oil Refill/200ml Refill compatible with the Cocodor diffuser. Alternatively, the refill bottle itself can be used by inserting a lead stick. [How to Use Preserved Flower Glass Tube] We recommend using glass tubes when using artificial flowers and preserved flowers. Even if a slight drain occurs when using the preserved, it is a natural phenomenon and there is no defect or use problem, so please use it with confidence, and even if you are not comfortable with it, we recommend using a glass tube [How to use a glass tube] 1) Insert the enclosed glass tube into the bottom of the preserved flower or artificial flower, and then pour it into the diffuser bottle. * Cocodor products escpeicallythe packages and fragrances are continuously being upgraded to improve the quality and to satisfy consumers.
